    The RodinProjectSelectionDialog implementation of this Dialog method builds a list of the selected RODIN projects for later retrieval by the client and closes this dialog.

  • Constructor Details

    • RodinProjectSelectionDialog

      public RodinProjectSelectionDialog(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Shell parentShell, IRodinProject initialRoot, boolean allowNewProjectName, String title, String message)
      Creates a rodin project selection dialog rooted at the given rodin database. All selections are considered valid.
      Parameters:
      parentShell - the parent shell
      initialRoot - the initial selection in the tree
      allowNewProjectName - true to enable the user to type in a new project name, and false to restrict the user to just selecting from existing ones
      message - the message to be displayed at the top of this dialog, or null to display a default message

  • Method Details

    • createDialogArea

      protected org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Control createDialogArea(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Overrides:
      createDialogArea in class org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog

    • okPressed

      protected void okPressed()
      The RodinProjectSelectionDialog implementation of this Dialog method builds a list of the selected RODIN projects for later retrieval by the client and closes this dialog.
      Overrides:
      okPressed in class org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog

    • setValidator

      public void setValidator(org.eclipse.ui.dialogs.ISelectionValidator validator)
      Sets the validator to use.
      Parameters:
      validator - A selection validator
